pr.title: Non-record: SWA and doc-isolated eval ablation — two negative findings at stride=64

output.summary: Controlled stride-64 ablations show default-warmdown SWA doesn’t help int8 and doc-isolated sliding-window evaluation hurts context.
techniques: Controlled SWA vs baseline on a single warmdown schedule
Doc-isolated vs flat-stream sliding-window eval at stride 64
Float32 SWA accumulation with periodic snapshot sampling
